name: Crisp Salmon in Rice Paper with Asian Au Jus
recipeIngredient: 2 lemon grass stalks, white part only
recipeInstructions:
1. Season each salmon steak with 1/2 teaspoon of cilantro and 1/2 teaspoon of salt.
2. Dip a rice paper in hot water until soft.
3. Place a seasoned salmon steak in the center of the rice paper.
4. Fold the sides of the rice paper over the salmon, then roll tightly to seal.
5. Heat sesame oil in a sauté pan. Add the salmon and cook until browned on one side.
6. Turn the salmon over and bake at 400°F (200°C) for 6-8 minutes.
7. In a small pot, combine soy sauce, sake wine, lemon grass, star anise, cilantro, garlic, and ginger. Bring to a boil.
8. Add julienne vegetables and simmer until cooked through.
9. Serve with fried vermicelli noodles garnish.
